name: UFG (Ultimate Fighting Game)
description: A deterministic 2D fighting game engine built with Kotlin and Compose Desktop. It features a JNI-bridged C++ WebRTC layer for low-latency peer-to-peer connectivity, AABB collision physics, and a circular input buffer for frame-precise combo detection. The project follows Hexagonal Architecture principles to decouple the core simulation from networking and rendering infrastructure.
tagline: High-performance 2D fighting game with P2P lockstep networking.
